title: FrozenAuction
description: Best Auction House plugin ever made for free
body:
> # 🏷️ FrozenAuction
A feature-rich, lag-free Auction House for PaperMC servers — built for survival, PvP, and economy servers.

1. ✨ Features
🛒 Full Auction Browser — Browse all listed items in a clean paginated GUI with sorting and filtering

2. 🔍 Smart Search — Search items by name in real-time via chat input

3. 📂 Category Filter — Filter by Blocks, Tools, Food, Combat, Potions, Books, Ingredients, or Utilities

4. 🔃 Sort Options — Sort by Newest, Oldest, Most Expensive, or Cheapest

5. 📦 My Listings — View, manage, and cancel your own active & expired listings

6. 💎 Shulker Box Preview — Right-click any listed shulker box to peek inside before buying

7. ✅ Buy & Sell Confirmation — Dedicated confirm/cancel screens before every transaction

8. 💰 Smart Price Format — Supports shorthand prices like 1k, 2.5k, 1m, 1b, 1t

9. 🔔 Offline Notifications — Sellers get notified of sales the moment they log back in

10. ⚖️ Permission-Based Listing Limits — Assign different listing caps per rank

11. 🛡️ Admin Controls — Remove any listing from the GUI with Ctrl+Q

12. 💾 YAML Persistence — All data saved automatically, no database setup needed


> # 👨‍💻 Developer

Made with ❤️ by DrFrozenXD — FrozenStudio
🐛 Found a bug? Open an issue or reach out directly!
